---
title: getPublicEnv
description: Return every MANIC_PUBLIC_* variable as a plain object — browser or Bun.
---

# `getPublicEnv()`

```ts
import { getPublicEnv } from 'manicjs/env';
```

---

## Signature

```ts
function getPublicEnv(): Record<string, string>;
```

---

## Behavior

| Runtime | Source |
| :--- | :--- |
| **Browser** | **`window.__MANIC_ENV__`** — whatever the build inlined |
| **Bun / Node** | **`process.env`** filtered to keys starting with **`MANIC_PUBLIC_`** |

---

## Usage

```ts
const publicEnv = getPublicEnv();
console.log(publicEnv.MANIC_PUBLIC_API_URL);
```

Pair with **[framework env guide](/docs/framework/advanced/environment-variables)** for injection semantics.

---
